title: umbilicus pendulinus var. horizontalis
intro: Umbilicus pendulinus var. horizontalis, also known as Creeping Jelly Bean or Pendulous Orpine, is a type of succulent plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Umbilicus pendulinus var. horizontalis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
